body.u: My job was the most important thing to aim for. The beginning of my career, it was a hard struggle to get a job exactly what I wanted. It was strange when I left I felt as though I was a new person from another planet. When the time came it was upsetting, because of loosinglosing contact with all the friends that you had made. I used to laugh at my parents when they used to say “school are the best days of your life”, and they were certainly writeright.
I can remember I saved and saved for my own car, and when I finally bought it I was so pleased, because it was something I had done for myself.
Getting promotion was also important to me, and I made it.
How the place has changed, the styles, I always loved following the up to date fashions.
I married at the age of 22 1983. At the age of 24 I had shared a family, therethey're grown up now, I have three grandchildren.
All I live for now is my family, and my home. Twice a week I look up some of my old freindsfriends it’s nice to talk about the old times.
My best hobby is cooking although there is only the two of us, I cook for an army.

I can remember I travelled to certain places abroad with my freindsfriends. Switzerland was the best place, we all enjoyed it there. I could never just sit and do nothing all I do is my intrestinginteresting social life
